title: Extracting Phone Numbers from a String
scenario: Write a prompt to extract phone numbers in the format '(XXX) XXX-XXXX' from a given string.
constraints: Must be under 40 lines of code

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated Python function must meet all the specified constraints.
The generated Python function should be syntactically correct.
The generated Python function should correctly extract phone numbers in the format '(XXX) XXX-XXXX'.
